# DISCOVER — Study Design, Safety & Scientific Rigor

All powers install `Available Inactive`; each prepares a reviewable preview and stops at a human gate.

## PWR-07 — Study Concept & Design Options Architect

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Prepares a non-authoritative synopsis with question, population/context, candidate designs, comparators, outcomes, bias threats, feasibility questions, and specialist review needs.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No final protocol, eligibility decision, intervention order, randomization, sample-size authority, statistical sign-off, clinical direction, or study launch.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-08 — Feasibility, Participant Burden & Safety Readiness Lens

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Examines aggregate feasibility, recruitment assumptions, workflow burden, access, inclusion, site capacity, safety routes, monitoring ownership, and stop criteria.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No recruitment list, screening, consent, enrollment, safety-event narrative, causality/severity determination, monitoring, reporting, or assurance that a study is safe/feasible.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-09 — Outcomes, Measures & Analysis-Intent Studio

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Defines concepts, candidate measures, denominators, provenance, missingness, subgroup/equity questions, analysis intentions, interpretation limits, and qualified reviewer needs.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No row-level analysis, final statistical plan, automated subgroup discovery, individual prediction, causal conclusion, or selective-result promotion.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.
